NAME: CANARY_API_KEY
NOTES: Alternate live canary metrics key when Grafana key is not used.

NAME: CANARY_APPLY_WEIGHT_HOOK_URL
NOTES: Generic hook that applies requested canary weight.

NAME: CANARY_BACKEND_HEALTH_URLS
NOTES: Backend healthcheck list for live canary runtime validation.

NAME: CANARY_ENABLED
NOTES: Kill-switch: live canary only runs when true.

NAME: CANARY_PROM_URL
NOTES: Metrics base URL for live canary.

NAME: CANARY_ROLLBACK_HOOK_URL
NOTES: Rollback hook for failed canary stage.

NAME: CANARY_WEB_SMOKE_URL
NOTES: Web smoke endpoint for live canary runtime validation.

NAME: GH_AUTH_VAULT_FIELD
NOTES: Points to a Vault KV field that stores a GitHub token.

NAME: GH_AUTH_VAULT_PATH
NOTES: Points to a Vault KV path that stores a GitHub token.

NAME: GH_LOCAL_AUTOPILOT_TOKEN
NOTES: Local autopilot token; value never logged.

NAME: GH_SECRETS_SYNC_TOKEN
MIN_SCOPE_OR_PERMISSIONS: PAT/fine-grained token that can update repo secrets
NOTES: Used only for writing GitHub Secrets (GITHUB_TOKEN cannot).

NAME: GITHUB_TOKEN
NOTES: Do not store as secret; permissions must be explicit per workflow.

NAME: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL
NOTES: Base URL for Playwright tests (dispatch can override).

NAME: ZAP_AUTH_HEADER_NAME
NOTES: Header name injected into ZAP requests when auth mode is bearer_header.

NAME: ZAP_AUTH_HEADER_VALUE
NOTES: Header value injected into ZAP requests; never logged.
